title: What Did You Expect?
description: Perhaps this was always how Trump’s ill-conceived war was destined to end.
author: Daniel B. Shapiro

title: A Robin Hood You May Not Want to Root for
description: A mournful new film reimagines the classic do-gooder as an antihero.
author: David Sims

title: Netanyahu Finally Learns the Truth About Trump
description: An alliance with the president was the Israeli prime minister’s selling point. Now it may be his downfall.
author: Yair Rosenberg

title: What Color Is the Reflecting Pool? An Investigation.
description: President Trump wanted an American-flag-blue Reflecting Pool. Instead, he got a swamp.
author: Matt Viser

title: All the Sad Hawks
description: Neoconservatives are struggling to reconcile their hopes for Trump with the failure of his Iran war.
author: Jonathan Chait

title: The Apotheosis of Donald Trump
description: On the president’s 80th birthday, it became clear that he has entered his decline.
author: Peter Wehner

title: The Pentagon Might Win the Lottery
description: But even $1.5 trillion won’t solve its problems.
author: Nancy A. Youssef

title: Photos: The Passion of World Cup Fans
description: The 2026 World Cup is under way, and fans around the world are gathering in stadiums, pubs, and even churches—both at home and in the three host countries—to cheer for their teams and ride the emotion
author: Alan Taylor

title: Cuba Is Collapsing. Will Trump Invade?
description: The CNN international correspondent Patrick Oppmann on Trump’s fixation on Cuba, the current state of the Cuban government, and what happens next. Plus: J. D. Vance’s presidential aspirations, andOthe
author: David Frum

title: An Ascendant Constitutional Theory Is a Threat to American Science
description: The idea of a “unitary executive” is now being extended to America’s scientific establishment, with potentially devastating effects.
author: Mark Histed

title: The Feel-Good Story of the World Cup Is Too Good to Be True
description: Some of the people celebrating American excess are not what they seem.
author: Will Oremus

title: TheToy StoryFranchise Forgot Its Own Message
description: Pixar made a classic trilogy about growing up. At that point, the studio should have left its toys behind.
author: Jacob Stern

title: Are You There, God? It’s Me, J. D. Vance, and I Have Some Notes.
author: Alexandra Petri

title: A New Generation of Moms Who Get High
description: Weed, they say, is what helps them survive full-time parenting. But at what cost?
author: Sarah Levy

title: AI Is Taking Over Hospitals
description: This is health care’s Uber moment.
author: Benjamin Mazer

title: AtlanticTrivia: Coats of Arms
description: Test your knowledge—and read our stories for a little extra help.
author: Drew Goins

title: Trump in Defeat
description: The president went to war triumphant and will likely leave greatly weakened.
author: Jonathan Lemire

title: Trump Does Not Understand the War He Lost
description: The president’s comments at the G7 summit revealed that he doesn’t understand the war he started—or the words that come out of his own mouth.
author: Tom Nichols

title: The Doha Connection
description: Trump’s off-ramp from war with Iran runs through Qatar.
author: Shane Harris

title: Oil Prices Might Not Go Back to Normal Anytime Soon
description: There’s a big difference between reopening the Strait of Hormuz on paper and actually resuming the flow of oil through it.
author: Rogé Karma
